attributes.action: Improve the understanding of Endometriosis & Adenomyosis in Primary Care
attributes.additional_details: I am an individual diagnosed with both conditions who is also a newly qualified Nursing Associate working in Primary Care. I see first hand the lack of knowledge on these long-term, whole body conditions amongst the people I work with, but also from personal experience of getting my diagnosis and trying to receive optimal healthcare to manage my conditions. Over 1.5M people in the UK have Endometriosis and it takes an avg 9y to diagnose - this needs to change and it starts with GP education.
attributes.background: By improving the understanding of Endometriosis & Adenomyosis in Primary Care, we can aid faster diagnosis, better management and more positive outcomes for the above named suspected or diagnosed conditions.

rejection.details:
We have a quite a few petitions already open on endometriosis support, diagnosis and treatment which you may wish to sign as they are asking for the same things that you are asking for:

https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions?state=open&q=endometriosis
